body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The first of our Special Orders Training Webinar, in this session we walk through the fundamentals of Special Orders, including creating a sale, processing the Purchase Order and dispatching the stock."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Watch the Advanced Special Orders Training - the second in our two-part training series."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "iframe", "url": "https://player.vimeo.com/video/442580223?title=0&byline=0&portrait=0", "frameAttributes": {"width": "700", "height": "400"}, "embedData": {"url": "https://player.vimeo.com/video/442580223?title=0&byline=0&portrait=0", "embedType": "iframe", "name": "", "width": "700", "height": "400"}}]
